description: Frosted-glass cards on saturated gradient backdrop. Stripe-2022 influence that saturated the ecosystem 2023–2025.
avoid_reasoning: `backdrop-filter: blur(20px)` on `bg-white/10` over `from-purple-500 to-pink-500` is the single most-copied pattern of 2023. Signals 'modern' by imitation, not by design choice.

images.caption: Stripe-inspired landing with gradient backdrop + frosted cards
Dashboard with glass-effect stat cards over purple gradient
Pricing page with translucent tier cards on rainbow gradient
